overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a moody, atmospheric forest at dusk. The character traverses a wooden bridge over a chasm, passes an abandoned campsite, and enters a narrow rocky canyon with glowing particles floating in the air.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a dense pine forest beside a small stream

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
small water stream running parallel to the path on the right side
large rocky boulders and outcrops among the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a white-haired character walking along a dirt trail through a dense forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while a small stream runs parallel on the right. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with a blue-green color grade, and glowing particles float in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden plank bridge over a deep chasm

events.description: character steps onto wooden plank bridge spanning a deep rocky chasm

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden bridge over the deep gorge

entered.detail: rickety wooden plank bridge crossing a deep chasm
deep rocky gorge with steep cliff faces below the bridge
ancient stone wall ruins visible near the bridge exit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a wooden plank bridge spanning a deep rocky chasm. The environment becomes more enclosed with steep rock faces visible below. Ancient stone ruins appear on the left as the character exits the bridge and continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest plateau with abandoned campsite

events.description: passing an abandoned campsite with supply crates and wooden barrels on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through an open forest area with views of distant mountains, passing abandoned supplies

entered.detail: campsite with scattered supplies and equipment on the ground
wooden crates and bags left at the campsite
snow-capped mountain range visible in the background through the trees

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the scene opens into a wider forest plateau with views of distant snow-capped mountains. The character passes an abandoned campsite with wooden crates and barrels scattered on the right side of the path. The trail continues through mixed forest and rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between tall stone walls

events.description: entering a narrow rocky canyon with towering stone walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon passage with tall rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: tall sheer rock walls forming a narrow canyon passage
narrow winding path between high rock formations leading toward distant light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon with towering stone walls on both sides that block most of the sky. The path becomes darker and more enclosed as the character walks toward a distant opening where light is visible. The environment shifts from open forest to a tight, sheltered rock passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, overcast forest that gradually narrows into a sheltered rocky canyon. It begins by following a white-haired character along a dirt trail lined with tall pine trees and a parallel stream, where glowing particles drift through a blue-green atmosphere. As the character progresses, the path leads across a wooden plank bridge spanning a deep rocky chasm, passing ancient stone ruins as the environment becomes more enclosed. The scene then opens onto a wider forest plateau with views of distant snow-capped mountains and an abandoned campsite of crates and barrels before the trail winds back into rocky terrain. Finally, the camera follows the character into a narrow canyon with towering stone walls that block the sky, shifting from the open forest into a dark, tight passage leading toward a distant light.
